acceptance_criteria: Does the page render without JavaScript errors in the browser console?
Are all text elements displaying in Japanese (ja locale) on initial load?
Do all interactive elements (buttons, links, navigation) respond to user interaction without lag or freezing?
Is the layout responsive and readable on both desktop and mobile viewports without horizontal scrolling on mobile?
Are images and media assets loading completely within 5 seconds on desktop viewport?
Does the page title and meta description contain appropriate Japanese content for SEO?
